title: April 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 15''' is the 105th day of the year (106th in leap years). There are 260 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1900]] - [[Ian Selby]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Tom Kane]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 106|''Star Wars'' (1977) 106]] published.
*[[1998]] – [[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 67|''Star Wars Insider'' 67]] published.
*[[2005]] – "[[A Bitter Winter]]" archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] [[Fiction]].
*[[2009]] – [[The Clone Wars 5|''The Clone Wars'' 5]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Rakghoul pandemic]] event in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' begins.
*[[2013]] – [[Richard LeParmentier]] dies.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 4|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 4]] published in Germany.
*[[2019]] – [[Celebration Chicago]] ends.
*[[2021]] – [[Ira Keeler]] dies.
*[[2025]] – [[The High Republic: Into the Light (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Into the Light'' audiobook]] published.
*2025 – ''[[A New Hope: A Collector's Classic Board Book]]'' published.
<noinclude>
